metadata.description: SE Harness marketplace — AI-agentic SDLC harness for any project, dual-published for Claude Code and GitHub Copilot CLI (Copilot reads this same file).

plugins.name: se-harness
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin: interview/scan, recommend, bootstrap, goal loop with HITL gates, three-tier memory, sync, export. Install this one in Claude Code.

plugins.name: se-harness-copilot
plugins.description: GitHub Copilot CLI variant (generated from se-harness): agent roster, harness skills, goal-loop commands, bundled enforcement hooks. Install this one with `copilot plugin install` — see docs/setup-guide-copilot.md.
